note: The current CityUHK Catalogue publishes one Major, Public Affairs and Management, with two Streams: Public Affairs and Governance and Public Policy and Management. The Streams are not separate Majors. Normative four-year students complete 15 credit units of Foundation-year Courses, then specialize in one Stream and complete that Stream's 33 credit units of Core Courses and 15 credit units of Stream Electives, for 63 Major credit units. Stream completion and the official Either PIA3800 or CAI4001 restriction require manual review. The Catalogue publishes no course-level Year or Term assignments; Catalogue Term Semester A 2026/27 identifies the curriculum version only.
